strategy.description: Reduce position sizes. Prefer mean-reversion and range-bound strategies. Be very selective — quality over quantity.

picks.name: Prudential Financial, Inc.
picks.buy_reason: Valuation: Trading at trailing P/E of 9.4x, forward P/E of 6.2x (indicating earnings acceleration), P/B of 1.01x, well below sector averages. This suggests the market is underpricing the company's earnings power and asset base. Fundamentals: Revenue growing at 31% year-over-year. The combination of growth and profitability indicates a business with sustainable competitive advantages and strong pricing power. Technical picture: Rsi at 32 indicates oversold conditions — contrarian buying opportunity, and RSI bullish divergence detected, suggesting downside momentum is fading while the price prepares for a reversal. Risk/reward: Entry zone $92.00–$95.88 with a target of $108.55 (+15.0% upside) against a stop loss at $89.01 (-5.7% risk), yielding a 2.6:1 reward-to-risk ratio. Recommended holding period: 4-8 months.
